title: leontopodium alpinum var. nivale
intro: Leontopodium alpinum var. nivale, also known as Edelweiss, is a low-growing, perennial alpine plant native to the European Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and fight infection. The health benefits of Edelweiss include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Edelweiss is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
